parameters.pythonCode:
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone

# Extract charge data from webhook body (or manual/schedule input)
body = _items[0]["json"].get("body", _items[0]["json"])

charge_id = body.get("charge_id", str(uuid.uuid4())[:12])
email = (body.get("email", "") or "").strip().lower()
processed_at = body.get("processed_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
line_item = body.get("line_item", "")
total_price = float(body.get("total_price", 0) or 0)
currency = body.get("currency", "USD")
billing_period = body.get("billing_period", datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m"))

run_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
triggered_by = "webhook"

params = {
    "charge_id": charge_id,
    "email": email,
    "processed_at": processed_at,
    "line_item": line_item,
    "total_price": total_price,
    "currency": currency,
    "billing_period": billing_period,
    "run_id": run_id,
    "triggered_by": triggered_by
}

# Write context file so Process & Classify can access charge data
with open('/tmp/.n8n_run_context.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(params, f)

return [{"json": params}]

parameters.query:
SELECT run_id FROM reconciliation_runs
WHERE source_system = 'chargehub'
  AND status = 'completed'
  AND summary->>'charge_id' = '{{ $json.charge_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO reconciliation_runs (
  run_id, billing_period, source_system, status, triggered_by, started_at, summary
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.run_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.billing_period }}',
  'chargehub',
  'running',
  '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.triggered_by }}',
  NOW(),
  jsonb_build_object('charge_id', '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.charge_id }}')
);

nodes.name: HubSpot — Search by Email
nodes.notes: Searches HubSpot contacts by exact email match. Uses HTTP Request instead of native node to support custom membership properties.

nodes.name: Contact Found?
nodes.notes: Checks if HubSpot API returned at least one contact result.

nodes.name: HubSpot — Fallback Search
nodes.notes: Fallback: searches by email domain if exact email match fails. Returns up to 5 contacts at the same domain for manual review.

parameters.pythonCode:
import json
from datetime import datetime

# ── Load charge data from context file ──
with open('/tmp/.n8n_run_context.json', 'r') as f:
    charge = json.load(f)

# ── Load HubSpot data from upstream node ──
hs_data = _items[0]["json"] if _items else {}
contact = None
props = {}

# Handle both native HubSpot node and HTTP Request response formats
if hs_data.get("id"):
    contact = hs_data
    props = contact.get("properties", {})
elif hs_data.get("results"):
    results = hs_data["results"]
    if results:
        contact = results[0]
        props = contact.get("properties", {})

# ── Tier normalization lookup (from reconcile.py) ──
TIER_USD = {
    "starter": 750.0,
    "pro": 2500.0,
    "executive": 6000.0,
    "executive annual": 24000.0,
}

email = charge.get("email", "")
charge_tier = (charge.get("line_item", "") or "").strip()
charge_price = float(charge.get("total_price", 0) or 0)
charge_currency = charge.get("currency", "USD")
charge_date = charge.get("processed_at", "")
run_id = charge.get("run_id", "")
charge_id = charge.get("charge_id", "")

# Normalize charge amount (non-USD → use tier lookup)
charge_normalized = charge_price
if charge_currency.upper() != "USD":
    charge_normalized = TIER_USD.get(charge_tier.lower().strip(), charge_price)

# ── Default result: no HubSpot match (untracked) ──
result = {
    "run_id": run_id,
    "charge_id": charge_id,
    "matching_email": email,
    "match_type": "charge_no_crm",
    "revenue_status": "untracked",
    "severity": "critical",
    "revenue_at_risk": charge_normalized,
    "contact_id": "",
    "membership_id": "",
    "membership_tier": "",
    "membership_mrr": None,
    "membership_mrr_normalized": None,
    "membership_currency": "",
    "membership_billing_date": "",
    "membership_billing_source": "",
    "membership_status": "",
    "membership_type": "",
    "chargehub_line_item": charge_tier,
    "chargehub_total_price": charge_price,
    "chargehub_total_price_normalized": charge_normalized,
    "chargehub_currency": charge_currency,
    "chargehub_processed_date": charge_date,
    "tier_mismatch": True,
    "billing_date_mismatch": True,
    "mrr_mismatch": True,
    "mrr_normalized_mismatch": True,
    "currency_mismatch": True,
    "billing_source_mismatch": True,
    "status_mismatch": True,
    "type_mismatch": True,
    "fix_instructions": f"No HubSpot contact found for {email}. Create contact and link membership.",
    "audit_category": "missing_record",
    "audit_summary": f"Charge for {email} ({charge_tier}, ${charge_price}) has no HubSpot contact. Revenue collected but not tracked."
}

if contact:
    contact_id = props.get("hs_object_id", "") or str(contact.get("id", ""))
    m_tier = (props.get("membership_tier", "") or "").strip()
    m_mrr_raw = props.get("membership_mrr", "")
    m_mrr = float(m_mrr_raw) if m_mrr_raw else None
    m_currency = (props.get("membership_currency", "") or "").strip()
    m_type = (props.get("membership_type", "") or "").strip()
    m_billing_date = (props.get("membership_billing_date", "") or "").strip()
    m_billing_source = (props.get("membership_billing_source", "") or "").strip()
    m_status = (props.get("membership_status", "") or "").strip()
    m_id = props.get("membership_id", "") or ""

    if not m_tier and not m_id:
        # Contact exists but no membership data linked
        result["contact_id"] = contact_id
        result["fix_instructions"] = f"Contact {email} found (ID: {contact_id}) but no membership linked. Create membership."
    else:
        # ── Normalize membership MRR (non-USD → tier lookup) ──
        m_mrr_normalized = m_mrr
        if m_mrr and m_currency and m_currency.upper() != "USD":
            m_mrr_normalized = TIER_USD.get(m_tier.lower().strip(), m_mrr)

        # ── Compute mismatch flags ──
        tier_mm = charge_tier.lower().strip() != m_tier.lower().strip() if m_tier else True
        mrr_mm = abs(charge_price - (m_mrr or 0)) > 0.01 if m_mrr is not None else True
        mrr_norm_mm = abs(charge_normalized - (m_mrr_normalized or 0)) > 0.01 if m_mrr_normalized is not None else True
        currency_mm = charge_currency.upper() != m_currency.upper() if m_currency else False
        source_mm = m_billing_source.lower() != "chargehub" if m_billing_source else True
        status_mm = m_status.lower() != "active" if m_status else True
        type_mm = m_type.lower() != "paying member" if m_type else True

        # Date proximity (±1 day, ported from reconcile.py)
        date_mm = True
        if m_billing_date and charge_date:
            try:
                def parse_date(s):
                    if "T" in s:
                        return datetime.fromisoformat(s.replace("Z", "+00:00")).date()
                    return datetime.strptime(s[:10], "%Y-%m-%d").date()
                date_mm = abs((parse_date(m_billing_date) - parse_date(charge_date)).days) > 1
            except Exception:
                pass

        # ── Classify revenue status ──
        any_mm = any([tier_mm, mrr_mm, mrr_norm_mm, currency_mm, source_mm, status_mm, type_mm, date_mm])

        if tier_mm:
            rev_status, sev = "disputed", "critical"
            risk = abs(charge_normalized - (m_mrr_normalized or 0))
        elif any_mm:
            rev_status, sev, risk = "disputed", "warning", 0
        else:
            rev_status, sev, risk = "confirmed", "info", 0

        # ── Build fix instructions ──
        fixes = []
        if tier_mm: fixes.append(f"Tier: ChargeHub={charge_tier}, HubSpot={m_tier}")
        if mrr_mm: fixes.append(f"MRR: ChargeHub=${charge_price}, HubSpot=${m_mrr}")
        if currency_mm: fixes.append(f"Currency: {charge_currency} vs {m_currency}")
        if source_mm: fixes.append(f"Billing source: {m_billing_source or 'unknown'}")
        if status_mm: fixes.append(f"Status: {m_status or 'unknown'} (expected Active)")
        if type_mm: fixes.append(f"Type: {m_type or 'unknown'} (expected Paying Member)")

        # ── Build audit entry ──
        audit_cat, audit_sum = "billing_metadata", f"Metadata mismatch for {email}."
        if rev_status == "untracked":
            audit_cat = "missing_record"
            audit_sum = f"Charge for {email} ({charge_tier}, ${charge_price}) has no HubSpot contact."
        elif tier_mm:
            audit_cat = "tier"
            audit_sum = f"Tier mismatch for {email}: ChargeHub={charge_tier}, HubSpot={m_tier}. Revenue at risk: ${risk}/mo."
        elif mrr_mm:
            audit_cat = "mrr"
            audit_sum = f"MRR mismatch for {email}: ChargeHub ${charge_price} vs HubSpot ${m_mrr}."
        elif currency_mm:
            audit_cat = "currency"
            audit_sum = f"Currency mismatch for {email}: {charge_currency} vs {m_currency}."

        result.update({
            "match_type": "matched",
            "revenue_status": rev_status,
            "severity": sev,
            "revenue_at_risk": risk,
            "contact_id": contact_id,
            "membership_id": m_id,
            "membership_tier": m_tier,
            "membership_mrr": m_mrr,
            "membership_mrr_normalized": m_mrr_normalized,
            "membership_currency": m_currency,
            "membership_billing_date": m_billing_date,
            "membership_billing_source": m_billing_source,
            "membership_status": m_status,
            "membership_type": m_type,
            "tier_mismatch": tier_mm,
            "billing_date_mismatch": date_mm,
            "mrr_mismatch": mrr_mm,
            "mrr_normalized_mismatch": mrr_norm_mm,
            "currency_mismatch": currency_mm,
            "billing_source_mismatch": source_mm,
            "status_mismatch": status_mm,
            "type_mismatch": type_mm,
            "fix_instructions": "; ".join(fixes) if fixes else "",
            "audit_category": audit_cat,
            "audit_summary": audit_sum
        })

# Build alert text
alert = f"*{result['revenue_status'].upper()}* — {email}"
if result["revenue_status"] != "confirmed":
    alert += f"\nSeverity: {result['severity']}"
    if result["revenue_at_risk"] > 0:
        alert += f"\nRevenue at risk: ${result['revenue_at_risk']:,.2f}"
    if result.get("fix_instructions"):
        alert += f"\nFix: {result['fix_instructions']}"
result["alert_text"] = alert

return [{"json": result}]

nodes.name: Process & Classify
nodes.notes: Core reconciliation logic ported from reconcile.py for single-record processing. Receives HubSpot data from upstream, reads charge data from context file. Classifies: confirmed / disputed / phantom / untracked.

parameters.query:
-- Insert reconciliation result
INSERT INTO reconciliation_results (
  run_id, matching_email, match_type, revenue_status,
  contact_id, membership_id,
  membership_tier, chargehub_line_item,
  membership_billing_date, chargehub_processed_date,
  membership_mrr, chargehub_total_price,
  membership_mrr_normalized, chargehub_total_price_normalized,
  membership_currency, chargehub_currency,
  membership_billing_source, membership_status, membership_type,
  tier_mismatch, billing_date_mismatch, mrr_mismatch,
  mrr_normalized_mismatch, currency_mismatch,
  billing_source_mismatch, status_mismatch, type_mismatch,
  revenue_at_risk, severity, fix_instructions
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.run_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.matching_email }}',
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.match_type }}',
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_status }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.contact_id }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_id }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_tier }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.chargehub_line_item }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_billing_date }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.chargehub_processed_date }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_mrr }}', '')::NUMERIC,
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.chargehub_total_price || 0 }},
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_mrr_normalized }}', '')::NUMERIC,
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.chargehub_total_price_normalized || 0 }},
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_currency }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.chargehub_currency }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_billing_source }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_status }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.membership_type }}', ''),
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.tier_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.billing_date_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.mrr_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.mrr_normalized_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.currency_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.billing_source_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.status_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.type_mismatch }},
  {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_at_risk || 0 }},
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.severity }}',
  '{{ ($('Process & Classify').item.json.fix_instructions || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

-- Insert audit log entry (only for non-confirmed results)
INSERT INTO audit_log (
  event_type, category, severity, source_system,
  reference_ids, summary, revenue_impact
)
SELECT
  'mismatch_detected',
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.audit_category }}',
  '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.severity }}',
  'chargehub',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'run_id', '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.run_id }}',
    'contact_id', '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.contact_id }}',
    'charge_id', '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.charge_id }}'
  ),
  '{{ ($('Process & Classify').item.json.audit_summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ -($('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_at_risk || 0) }}
WHERE '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_status }}' != 'confirmed';

UPDATE reconciliation_runs
SET status = 'completed',
    completed_at = NOW(),
    summary = jsonb_build_object(
      'charge_id', '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.charge_id }}',
      'email', '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.email }}',
      'revenue_status', '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_status }}',
      'severity', '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.severity }}',
      'revenue_at_risk', {{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.revenue_at_risk || 0 }},
      'match_type', '{{ $('Process & Classify').item.json.match_type }}'
    )
WHERE run_id = '{{ $('Set Run Parameters').item.json.run_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Create HubSpot Task
nodes.notes: Creates a HIGH priority task in HubSpot for critical reconciliation issues. Uses HTTP Request for direct API control.
